# GrowthOS by Cima Growth Solutions

> AI-powered patient engagement platform for healthcare clinics

GrowthOS is built on a core belief: most clinics don't have a lead problem—they have a communication and systems problem. Patient leakage happens when inquiries go unanswered, follow-ups fall through the cracks, and leads go cold before staff can respond.

## The Problem GrowthOS Solves

Healthcare clinics lose potential patients every day because:
- Inquiries arrive outside business hours with no immediate response
- Staff is too busy with in-clinic patients to follow up consistently
- Leads require multiple touchpoints but manual follow-up is unsustainable
- Patient communication is scattered across channels with no unified view
- Cold leads sit untouched because reactivation takes too much effort

## How GrowthOS Works

### The AI Engine

GrowthOS uses a custom-trained AI that:
- Responds instantly to every inquiry, regardless of when it arrives
- Nurtures leads over days or weeks without manual effort
- Uses your clinic's approved messaging, tone, and protocols
- Hands off warm leads to staff with full conversation context

### The System Around It

GrowthOS provides the infrastructure clinics need:

**Unified Inbox**
All patient conversations in one place—AI and staff messages combined. Multi-channel aggregation, conversation threading, and team assignment.

**Pipelines and Patient Journeys**
Clear stages so every lead is tracked. Custom configuration, automatic progression, and stale lead alerts.

**Follow-up Rules and Automations**
Set standards once. Missed-call text back, appointment reminders, no-show sequences.

**Reactivation Campaigns**
Bring cold leads back with scheduled SMS and email outreach. Segmented targeting, multi-touch sequences, response tracking.

**Reporting and Visibility**
See response speed, conversion movement, and where patients drop off. Source attribution, stage conversion rates, team performance.

## Integration Options

### Plug-In Mode
GrowthOS sits on top of Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, or any CRM. The AI handles patient engagement while your team works in familiar tools.

### Hybrid Mode
Pick the modules you need—AI follow-up, unified inbox, pipelines—and integrate with your existing stack via API.

### Full Platform Mode
GrowthOS becomes your complete patient management infrastructure. No more spreadsheets, no more tool juggling.

## Pricing

**Monthly Plan**
- $999 per month
- $999 one-time setup fee
- Full access to all features
- Unlimited leads, AI conversations, and team members

**Annual Plan**
- $9,999 per year
- No setup fee
- $500 Meta & Google Ads credit included
- Full access to all features
- Unlimited leads, AI conversations, and team members

No per-lead charges. No usage fees. One plan with full access.

## Target Industries

GrowthOS is specifically designed for:
- **Fertility Clinics**: High-consideration patient journeys requiring consistent nurturing
- **Med Spas**: Aesthetic practices with diverse treatment inquiries
- **Wellness Centers**: Holistic health practices needing appointment coordination
- **Regenerative Medicine**: Clinics offering advanced treatments with educated patients

## Implementation

GrowthOS is typically live within 24-48 hours. Setup includes:
- AI training on your clinic's voice, protocols, and FAQs
- Channel integration (web forms, phone, SMS, email, social)
- CRM connection if applicable
- Staff onboarding and configuration

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is patient leakage?**
Patient leakage refers to potential patients who inquire about services but never convert because of slow response times, inconsistent follow-up, or poor communication systems.

**How quickly does the AI respond?**
GrowthOS responds instantly—within seconds—to any inquiry on any connected channel.

**Does GrowthOS replace my CRM?**
It can. GrowthOS works as a standalone platform or integrates with existing CRMs like Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho.

**Are there per-lead or usage fees?**
No. Your subscription covers unlimited leads, AI conversations, and team members.

**How long does setup take?**
Most clinics are live within 24-48 hours.

**Can I use only certain features?**
Yes. GrowthOS is modular. Use the AI engine with your existing CRM, or adopt specific modules like the unified inbox or pipelines.
